Petition For Allowance Of Resignation Of Co-Executor And Request For Reissuance Of Letters Testamentary In The Name Of Sole Executor
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Off Calendar
EX PARTE PETITION FOR ORDER SHORTENING TIME FOR HEARING OF PETITION FOR ALLOWANCE OF RESIGNATION OF CO-EXECUTOR AND REQUEST FOR REISSUANCE OF LETTERS TESTAMENTARY IN THE NAME OF SOLE EXECUTOR

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Yvonne Thrasher appeared via zoom for and with Magdalena Downing and Xiomara Mendoza (co-executors).

There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The lost will dated October 31, 2006 and lost codicil dated January 7, 2010 are admitted to probate. Magdalena Downing and Xiomara Mendoza (co-executors) are appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for December 02, 2024 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Carbona: Not reported.
